name: Medicine Availability Inquiries
context: Patient is asking about availability, pricing, and prescription requirements of medicines at HealthFirst Medical Clinic pharmacy. Stock: Paracetamol 500mg (₹30, OTC, in stock), Amoxicillin 250mg (₹85, Rx, in stock), Cetirizine 10mg (₹25, OTC, in stock), Metformin 500mg (₹45, Rx, out of stock), Omeprazole 20mg (₹60, Rx, in stock), Ibuprofen 400mg (₹35, OTC, in stock), Azithromycin 500mg (₹120, Rx, in stock), Vitamin D3 1000IU (₹150, OTC, in stock), Cough Syrup Benadryl (₹95, OTC, out of stock), Insulin Glargine (₹850, Rx, in stock).

seedQuestions.question: Is Paracetamol available at your clinic?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Paracetamol 500mg is available at our clinic. It costs ₹30 and does not require a prescription.
Yes, Amoxicillin 250mg is available. It costs ₹85 and requires a prescription.
acceptableVariations: Amoxicillin is in stock but needs a prescription
We have Amoxicillin, you'll need a prescription

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Sorry, Metformin 500mg is currently out of stock.
acceptableVariations: Metformin is not available right now
We don't have Metformin in stock currently

seedQuestions.question: Is Vitamin D3 available and how much does it cost?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Vitamin D3 1000IU is available. It costs ₹150 and does not require a prescription.
acceptableVariations: Vitamin D3 is in stock at ₹150

seedQuestions.question: Do I need a prescription for Cetirizine?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: No, Cetirizine 10mg does not require a prescription. It is available for ₹25.
Sorry, Benadryl Cough Syrup is currently out of stock.
acceptableVariations: Benadryl is not available right now
Cough syrup is out of stock

seedQuestions.question: How much does Insulin Glargine cost? Do I need a prescription?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Insulin Glargine is available at ₹850. Yes, it requires a prescription.
acceptableVariations: Insulin Glargine costs ₹850 and needs a prescription

seedQuestions.question: Is Vitamin B12 available at your clinic?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Vitamin B12 is available at our clinic.
acceptableVariations: We do have Vitamin B12 in stock

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, we have Flucold tablets available.
Yes, Dolo 650 is available at our clinic.
Ibuprofen 400mg is available for ₹35. It does not require a prescription.

seedQuestions.question: Is Azithromycin available? Do I need a prescription for it?

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Azithromycin 500mg is available at ₹120. It requires a prescription.
acceptableVariations: Azithromycin is in stock at ₹120, prescription required

groundTruth.expectedAnswer: Yes, Omeprazole 20mg is available at ₹60. It requires a prescription.
acceptableVariations: Omeprazole is in stock, you'll need a prescription
